mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT dept_name FROM sys_dept WHERE id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0 AND id != #{excludeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0 AND id != #{excludeId}
